lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਅਭਾਗ ਅਭਾਗ ਹੈ ਜਿਨ ਕੇ ਤਿਨ ਸਾਧੂ ਧੂਰਿ ਨ ਪੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa abhaag abhaag hai jin ke tin saadhoo dhoor na peejai |
lines.english: Those who have terrible luck and bad fortune do not drink in the water which washes the dust of the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਾ ਤਿਸਨਾ ਜਲਤ ਜਲਤ ਨਹੀ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਡੰਡੁ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਕਾ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: tinaa tisanaa jalat jalat nahee boojheh ddandd dharam raae kaa deejai |6|
lines.english: The burning fire of their desires is not extinguished; they are beaten and punished by the Righteous Judge of Dharma. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਬਰਤ ਜਗੵ ਪੁੰਨ ਕੀਏ ਹਿਵੈ ਗਾਲਿ ਗਾਲਿ ਤਨੁ ਛੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh teerath barat jagay pun kee hivai gaal gaal tan chheejai |
lines.english: You may visit all the sacred shrines, observe fasts and sacred feasts, give generously in charity and waste away the body, melting it in the snow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤੁਲਾ ਤੋਲੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਕੋ ਪੁਜੈ ਨ ਤੋਲ ਤੁਲੀਜੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: atulaa tol raam naam hai guramat ko pujai na tol tuleejai |7|
lines.english: The weight of the Lord's Name is unweighable, according to the Guru's Teachings; nothing can equal its weight. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਵ ਗੁਨ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਤੂ ਜਾਨਹਿ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: tav gun braham braham too jaaneh jan naanak saran pareejai |
lines.english: O God, You alone know Your Glorious Virtues. Servant Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਜਲ ਨਿਧਿ ਮੀਨ ਹਮ ਤੇਰੇ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਖੀਜੈ ॥੮॥੩॥
lines.translit: too jal nidh meen ham tere kar kirapaa sang rakheejai |8|3|
lines.english: You are the Ocean of water, and I am Your fish. Please be kind, and keep me always with You. ||8||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪਿ ਧਰਉ ਸਭੁ ਆਗੈ ਰਸੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man tan arap dhrau sabh aagai ras guramat giaan drirreejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I surrender my mind and body, and place everything before Him; following the Guru's Teachings, spiritual wisdom is implanted within me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਾ ਰਮ ਰਾਮੋ ਪੂਜ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: raamaa ram raamo pooj kareejai |
lines.english: I worship and adore the Lord, the All-pervading Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਆਨ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaliaan mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kalyaan, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਨਾਮ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਖ ਤਰੋਵਰ ਨਿਤ ਚੁਨਿ ਚੁਨਿ ਪੂਜ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: braham naam gun saakh tarovar nit chun chun pooj kareejai |
lines.english: God's Name is the tree, and His Glorious Virtues are the branches. Picking and gathering up the fruit, I worship Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਦੇਉ ਦੇਉ ਹੈ ਆਤਮੁ ਰਸਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਪੂਜ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aatam deo deo hai aatam ras laagai pooj kareejai |1|
lines.english: The soul is divine; divine is the soul. Worship Him with love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਬੇਕ ਬੁਧਿ ਸਭ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬਿਚਰਿ ਬਿਚਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: bibek budh sabh jag meh niramal bichar bichar ras peejai |
lines.english: One of keen intellect and precise understanding is immaculate in all this world. In thoughtful consideration, he drinks in the sublime essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad padaarath paaeaa satigur kau ihu man deejai |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the treasure is found; dedicate this mind to the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮੋਲਕੁ ਅਤਿ ਹੀਰੋ ਨੀਕੋ ਹੀਰੈ ਹੀਰੁ ਬਿਧੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: niramolak at heero neeko heerai heer bidheejai |
lines.english: Priceless and utterly sublime is the Diamond of the Lord. This Diamond pierces the diamond of the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗਿ ਲਗਿ ਊਚੇ ਜਿਉ ਪੀਪ ਪਲਾਸ ਖਾਇ ਲੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: sangat sant sang lag aooche jiau peep palaas khaae leejai |
lines.english: Attaching oneself to the Society of the Saints, one is exalted and uplifted, as the palaas tree is absorbed by the peepal tree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮੋਤੀ ਸਾਲੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਹੀਰਾ ਪਰਖਿ ਲਈਜੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man motee saal hai gurasabadee jit heeraa parakh leejai |3|
lines.english: The mind becomes the jeweller, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad; it appraises the Diamond of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਨਰ ਮਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ਊਤਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੈ ਬਾਸੁ ਬਸੀਜੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabh nar meh praanee aootam hovai raam naamai baas baseejai |4|
lines.english: That mortal being is supreme among all people, who is perfumed by the fragrance of the Lord's Name. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਕਰਮ ਬਹੁ ਕੀਨੇ ਨਿਤ ਸਾਖਾ ਹਰੀ ਜੜੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: niramal niramal karam bahu keene nit saakhaa haree jarreejai |
lines.english: One who continually acts in goodness and immaculate purity, sprouts green branches in great abundance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮੁ ਫੁਲੁ ਫਲੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਬਹਕਾਰ ਬਾਸੁ ਜਗਿ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: dharam ful fal gur giaan drirraaeaa bahakaar baas jag deejai |5|
lines.english: The Guru has taught me that Dharmic faith is the flower, and spiritual wisdom is the fruit; this fragrance permeates the world. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਸਭ ਏਕੈ ਹੈ ਪਸਰੇ ਸਭ ਚਰਨ ਤਲੇ ਸਿਰੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aatam raam sabh ekai hai pasare sabh charan tale sir deejai |6|
lines.english: The One Lord, the Supreme Soul, is spread out everywhere; all place their heads beneath His Feet. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਜੋਤਿ ਏਕੋ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਭ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਇਕੁ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: ek jot eko man vasiaa sabh braham drisatt ik keejai |
lines.english: The One, the Light of the One, abides within my mind; God, the One, is seen in all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਨਕਟੇ ਨਰ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਤਿਨ ਘਸਿ ਘਸਿ ਨਾਕ ਵਢੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: naam binaa nakatte nar dekhahu tin ghas ghas naak vadteejai |
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, people look like criminals with their noses cut off; bit by bit, their noses are cut off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਨਰ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀ ਕਹੀਅਹਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵੀਜੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: saakat nar ahankaaree kaheeeh bin naavai dhrig jeeveejai |7|
lines.english: The faithless cynics are called egotistical; without the Name, their lives are cursed. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਸਾਸੁ ਸਾਸੁ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤਤੁ ਬੇਗਲ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag saas saas man antar tat begal saran pareejai |
lines.english: As long as the breath breathes through the mind deep within, hurry and seek God's Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਮੈ ਸਾਧੂ ਚਰਨ ਪਖੀਜੈ ॥੮॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak kripaa kripaa kar dhaarahu mai saadhoo charan pakheejai |8|4|
lines.english: Please shower Your Kind Mercy and take pity upon Nanak, that he may wash the feet of the Holy. ||8||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਾ ਮੈ ਸਾਧੂ ਚਰਨ ਧੁਵੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: raamaa mai saadhoo charan dhuveejai |
lines.english: O Lord, I wash the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਦਹਨ ਹੋਹਿ ਖਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kilabikh dehan hohi khin antar mere tthaakur kirapaa keejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: May my sins be burnt away in an instant; O my Lord and Master, please bless me with Your Mercy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਆਨ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaliaan mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kalyaan, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਗਤ ਜਨ ਦੀਨ ਖਰੇ ਦਰਿ ਠਾਢੇ ਅਤਿ ਤਰਸਨ ਕਉ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: mangat jan deen khare dar tthaadte at tarasan kau daan deejai |
lines.english: The meek and humble beggars stand begging at Your Door. Please be generous and give to those who are yearning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਤ੍ਰਾਹਿ ਸਰਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਏ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੀਜੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: traeh traeh saran prabh aae mo kau guramat naam drirreejai |1|
lines.english: Save me, save me, O God - I have come to Your Sanctuary. Please implant the Guru's Teachings, and the Naam within me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕਰੋਧੁ ਨਗਰ ਮਹਿ ਸਬਲਾ ਨਿਤ ਉਠਿ ਉਠਿ ਜੂਝੁ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaam karodh nagar meh sabalaa nit utth utth joojh kareejai |
lines.english: Sexual desire and anger are very powerful in the body-village; I rise up to fight the battle against them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਸਬਲ ਅਤਿ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਹਿਵ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਗੁਰ ਦੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: antar agan sabal at bikhiaa hiv seetal sabad gur deejai |
lines.english: The powerful fire of corruption is raging violently within; the Word of the Guru's Shabad is the ice water which cools and soothes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਗੀਕਾਰੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਰਖਿ ਲੇਵਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰਾ ਕਾਢਿ ਕਢੀਜੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: angeekaar karahu rakh levahu gur pooraa kaadt kadteejai |2|
lines.english: Please make me Your Own and save me; through the Perfect Guru, I drive them out. ||2||
